title: ardisia zeylanica
intro: Ardisia zeylanica, also known as the Wild Cinnamon or Ceylonese Spikenard, is a tropical plant species that belongs to the Araliaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Ardisia zeylanica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Ardisia zeylanica can be prepared as an herbal tea or in the form of a decoction, which is often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
